title: Keep Inventory Updated
description: Keep your armor and your hotbar, only your inventory will drop when you die !
body:
Tired of having to get your loot back when you die, but you don't want to turn on keep inventory ?

Keep Inventory Updated will make you keep everything in your hotbar, your offhand and your armor slots, but will drop the rest of your inventory when you die!

![demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d5f1eb3452aca61289fa4600ec5782aebda2d9f_0.webp)

Does this work with the ImmediateRespawn gamerule ?
- Yes !

What will happen to my exp when I die ?
- You will keep all your exp

What will happen if I have an item enchanted with curse of vanishing ?
- The curse is still working, the item will be gone forever.

How can I make sure this datapack is working ?
- If you type /datapack list in game "keep_inventory_updated" should appear!

Why can't I modify the keepinventory gamerule ?
- this datapack make sure that keepinventory stay enabled in order to work as intended.



If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k, any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !
